introSection: Dinosaur Mountain (Chinese: 飞越恐龙山) is a Zamperla motorbike roller coaster located at China Dinosaurs Park in Changzhou, Jiangsu, China. When it opened, it was called "Smart Shuttle" (Chinese: 翼龙穿梭), but the name was changed to the current one in 2012.
fullText: Dinosaur Mountain (Chinese: 飞越恐龙山) is a Zamperla motorbike roller coaster located at China Dinosaurs Park in Changzhou, Jiangsu, China. When it opened, it was called "Smart Shuttle" (Chinese: 翼龙穿梭), but the name was changed to the current one in 2012.
